title: Lakra
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Lakra |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions= |lifespan= |origin=[[Lakra system/Legends|Lakra system]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}{{Planetnamia|species=Lakra|system=[[Lakra system/Legends|Lakra system]]|legends=1}} |habitat= |diet= |language=[[Lakran language]] }} {{Quote|You will put your weapons on the floor now.''"
"''But we face very dangerous enemies. We cannot know when it will be necessary to fire.''"
"''The Lakra will do any firing that is necessary.|A Lakran mercenary squad leader and the Eickarie [[Su-mil]], while the latter is pretending to serve the Warlord|}} The '''Lakra''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] that originated in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Lakra system/Legends|Lakra system]]. Lakra [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kariek]], [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the [[Eickarie]] species, and entered a [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]]-long [[Kariek civil war|civil war]] with them. Around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], the [[The Warlord's species|alien]] known as [[the Warlord]] began a fifty-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-long tyrannical reign on Kariek, using Lakran [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] to subjugate the Eickaries. Eventually, the tribes of the latter [[United Tribes Agreement|unified]] and waged [[War on Kariek|war]] against the Warlord's forces with the aid of the [[Empire of the Hand]]. Ultimately, the Warlord was [[Capture of the Warlord|captured]], and the [[InterTribal Council]] of the [[United Tribes of Kariek]] was formed to govern both the Eickaries and the Lakra. ==Biology and appearance== The Lakra were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that had [[Limb/Legends|hands]] and feet. The hands of one Lakra, a [[Unidentified Lakra|mercenary squad leader]], were massive, and the sound of his voice resembled that of rocks being inside an operating [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]] blender. ==Society and culture== The Lakra could speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] but also made use of [[Lakran language|another]] [[Language/Legends|language]] that was not the main [[Trade language/Legends|trade language]] of the [[Eickarie]] species. The former species was more aggressive than the Eickaries.{{CSWECite|I|17|Ha-ran}} ==Lakra in the galaxy== ===Subjugation of the Eickaries=== {{Quote|If it were up to me, I'd give ''[the Eickaries]'' another month to chase the Lakra back into these reinforced beetle holes of theirs, then drop all two hundred of 'em into piles of rubble and go home.|[[Cloud (stormtrooper)|Cloud]]|}} The Lakra originated in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Lakra system/Legends|Lakra system]] and at some point [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] the Wild Space{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Kariek system/Legends|Kariek system]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kariek]], which was also [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the Eickaries. Eventually, a [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]]-long [[Kariek civil war|civil war]] began between the Lakra and the Eickaries{{CSWECite|II|108|InterTribal Council}} as well as among the various Eickarie tribes. Around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]],{{CSWECite|III|319|Warlord}} establishes that [[the Warlord]]'s reign on [[Kariek]] began approximately four [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], which corresponds to around [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. the [[The Warlord's species|alien]] known as [[the Warlord]], who had arrived on Kariek and aligned himself with the Lakra, began a fifty-[[Standard year/Legends|standard year]]–long tyrannical reign over the Eickaries. No Lakra or Eickarie was ever aware of the ruler's true identity,{{CSWECite|III|319|Warlord}} which he concealed behind a set of full-body [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. The Warlord utilized a force of Lakran [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] equipped with full armor and [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] to subjugate the Eickaries, and the oppressors co-opted ancient Eickarie [[Fortress/Legends|fortresses]] for their own purposes. Most of the Eickarie tribes eventually joined forces in opposing the Warlord's tyranny, in the process [[United Tribes Agreement|forming]] the government of the [[United Tribes of Kariek]]. They negotiated the aid of the [[Empire of the Hand]] interstellar state in overthrowing the Warlord, and during the subsequent eight-[[Standard month/Legends|month]] [[War on Kariek|war]] the Imperial [[Imperial Military/Legends|military forces]], alongside those of the Eickaries themselves, fought the Lakran mercenaries. ===Capture of the Warlord=== {{Quote|The way ''[the Warlord]'' walked around encased in that armor, we couldn't tell whether he was another Lakra, a rogue Eickarie, or someone from a species we hadn't run into before.|[[Jorm Whistler Mackenni|Twister]], on the Empire of the Hand|}} [[File:Aurek_7_FB.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Forces of the Empire of the Hand, including Unit Aurek-Seven (pictured), fought against Lakran mercenaries on Kariek.]] At some point by [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]],''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' is set before ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'', the events of which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]]. the Empire of the Hand, wishing to learn the identity of the Warlord, carried out an [[Capture of the Warlord|attack]] on the [[The Warlord's fortress|fortress]] housing the Warlord with the objective of capturing him. When, prior to the commencement of the attack, the Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Unit Aurek-Seven]] was approaching its designated position in the [[City/Legends|city]] near which the fortress was located, bad weather was skewing the [[Infrared/Legends|infrared]] data supplied to the [[Heads-up display/Legends|heads-up displays]] of the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers']] [[Helmet/Legends|helmets]] and was making it impossible to carry out [[Gas/Legends|gas]]-[[Spectrum/Legends|spectrum]] analysis, therefore hampering the unit's ability to distinguish between Eickaries or Lakra if they encountered them. Eventually, with the help of a group of Eickaries, Unit Aurek-Seven was able to infiltrate the fortress during the attack and, after several skirmishes against [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of Lakran [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]], the Warlord was captured. Subsequently, the Empire of the Hand discovered that the Warlord belonged to a species other than the Lakra or the Eickarie. Meanwhile, the United Tribes of Kariek formed the leadership body known as the [[InterTribal Council]], the mandate of which included [[Local day/Legends|day]]-to-day governance of both the Eickaries and the Lakra, and entered negotiations to join the Empire of the Hand. ==Behind the scenes== The Lakra appeared in ''[[Fool's Bargain]]'', a [[2004]] novella by [[Timothy Zahn]]. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], erroneously states that the Lakra-supported Warlord's reign on Kariek ended twenty-two years after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which corresponds to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' when in fact ''Fool's Bargain'', which depicts the event, must be set at some point by 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] instead. ==Appearances== *''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|multiple}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Wild Space sentient species]]
